Shall We Dance? (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $57,887,882Details
International Box Office $112,238,000
Worldwide Box Office $170,125,882
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$11,783,467 (20.4% of total gross)
Legs:4.91 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:34.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$40,000,000 (worldwide box office is 4.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:1,772 opening theaters/2,542 max. theaters, 6.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $105,461,554

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 15th, 2004 (Wide) by Miramax
International Releases: October 22nd, 2004 (Wide), released as Shall We Dance (Australia)
Video Release: February 1st, 2005 by Miramax Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for some sexual references and brieg language
Running Time: 106 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Foreign-Language Remake, Remake
Geographical setting: Chicago
Plot point: Dancing, Lawyers, Mid-Life Crisis, Private Investigator, Romance
Subgenre: Romantic Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Romantic Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Simon Fields Productions
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
